sql.header: SELECT i.c_invoice_id, i.documentno, i.dateinvoiced, dt.name AS doc_type, bp.name AS bp_name, bpl.name AS bp_location, i.description, i.grandtotal, i.totallines, pt.name AS payment_term, pm.name AS payment_method, cur.iso_code AS currency, CASE i.docstatus WHEN 'CO' THEN 'Complete' WHEN 'DR' THEN 'Draft' WHEN 'VO' THEN 'Void' ELSE i.docstatus END AS status, org.name AS org_name, orgi.taxid AS org_taxid, orgl.address1 AS org_address, orgl.postal AS org_postal, orgl.city AS org_city FROM c_invoice i JOIN c_bpartner bp ON bp.c_bpartner_id = i.c_bpartner_id JOIN c_bpartner_location bpl ON bpl.c_bpartner_location_id = i.c_bpartner_location_id LEFT JOIN c_doctype dt ON dt.c_doctype_id = i.c_doctypetarget_id LEFT JOIN c_paymentterm pt ON pt.c_paymentterm_id = i.c_paymentterm_id LEFT JOIN fin_paymentmethod pm ON pm.fin_paymentmethod_id = i.fin_paymentmethod_id LEFT JOIN c_currency cur ON cur.c_currency_id = i.c_currency_id JOIN ad_org org ON org.ad_org_id = i.ad_org_id LEFT JOIN ad_orginfo orgi ON orgi.ad_org_id = i.ad_org_id LEFT JOIN c_location orgl ON orgl.c_location_id = orgi.c_location_id WHERE i.c_invoice_id = '__DOCUMENTID__'
sql.lines: SELECT il.line, COALESCE(p.name, il.description) AS product_name, il.qtyinvoiced AS quantity, uom.name AS uom, il.priceactual, il.linenetamt FROM c_invoiceline il LEFT JOIN m_product p ON p.m_product_id = il.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_uom uom ON uom.c_uom_id = il.c_uom_id WHERE il.c_invoice_id = '__DOCUMENTID__' ORDER BY il.line
sql.taxes: SELECT t.name AS tax_name, it.taxbaseamt, it.taxamt FROM c_invoicetax it JOIN c_tax t ON t.c_tax_id = it.c_tax_id WHERE it.c_invoice_id = '__DOCUMENTID__' ORDER BY t.name
